name: Pharmaceutical
description: Prescription drugs, OTC medications, drug manufacturers (DTC advertising). Campaigns promoting specific drug products or pharmaceutical brands.

regulatory_frameworks.name: US FDA DTC Advertising Rules
regulatory_frameworks.summary: Requires fair balance (risks alongside benefits), major statement of side effects, and adequate provision for full prescribing information.

regulatory_frameworks.name: EU Directive 2001/83/EC
regulatory_frameworks.summary: Prohibits DTC advertising of prescription drugs entirely. OTC advertising permitted with restrictions.

guidance: Distinct from 'healthcare' because of FDA/EMA-specific advertising requirements. A hospital system ad is 'healthcare'; an Ozempic campaign is 'pharmaceutical'. Health-data targeting for pharmaceutical campaigns raises additional concerns about inferred medical conditions.
